# Finite Element Modeling

**Summary**: A numerical method to simulate and analyze the behavior of complex structures under stress.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-garni|Al-Garni, 2023]] used finite element modeling to simulate deformation of wormholes under high stresses.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The FEM simulations confirmed experimental results, showing that wormhole branches were more susceptible to deformation. ([[2023-al-garni|Al-Garni, 2023, p. 13]])
